channel.title: EmuR on Hywel Stoakes
channel.description: Recent content in EmuR on Hywel Stoakes

item.title: A New Home
item.description: I have recently moved institution and moved country to join a project researching pronunciation in Te Reo Māori at the University of Auckland in New Zealand. The outcome will be an app that helps a speaker become more confident and fluent with their pronunciation of Te Reo. So I thought I should update my website and maybe give it a new home too. This is work in progress, as all my projects seem to be.

item.title: A Test of HTML5 Audio Capabilities in Hugo
item.description:
A test of HTML5 audio in Hugo Here is an audio file (pulmonic consonant between two vowels). Your browser does not support the audio element Some text to break up the players Your browser does not support the audio element Embedded Javascript See the Pen wavesurfer.js zoom by Hywel Stoakes (@hywel_) on CodePen.
The fact that I can embed audio and see a visualisation is really encouraging!
